culturalNote: US-Gen-Z-leaning English-first hooks with UK/CA/AU edge cases. Major themes: late-twenties burnout, broke-but-aspirational, therapy normalization, ADHD/neurodivergence, dating-app fatigue, cost-of-living, hustle-culture pushback. Avoid Boomer-coded scripting. Voice is dry, self-deprecating, low-effort high-intent.

hooks.text: Anyone else can't sleep without a podcast running
Stop using Instagram if you actually want a life
POV it's 3am and you're hungry and broke
What's the most expensive thing you bought broke
Therapy is just expensive girl-dinner for your brain
Day in my life as a barista who rates customers
Why does no one talk about how hard 26 actually is
Your morning routine is the reason you're tired
POV your roommate ate your leftovers again
Are you actually busy or just bad at saying no
Stop dressing for who you used to be
Trying every viral coffee until I find one I'd buy daily
What's the lie you tell at job interviews
You don't need a productivity app you need a nap
Telling my parents I quit my job real time reaction
Why is grocery shopping a personality test now
If you have ADHD this one app changed my life
POV you matched on Hinge and they ghost you
What's a normal thing you find genuinely scary
Get ready with me for a job I actually hate
How do people just own a house I don't understand
Your phone wallpaper says everything about you
Things I'd tell my 22 year old self
Why does everyone in their 30s look so tired
Stop apologizing for taking up space

captionTemplates.template: if you have {trait}, you'll get this
tell me you're {identity} without telling me
things I wish I knew at {age}: {payoff}
why is no one talking about {topic}
wait until you see what {trigger} did

formats.name: POV reaction
formats.description: Talking-head intro then quick cuts to imagined scenes, single take

formats.name: Day in my life
formats.description: Chronological cuts of routine moments with text overlays

formats.name: Get ready with me
formats.description: Talking while applying makeup or dressing, single mirror shot

formats.name: Rate this until I find one
Things I wish I knew
formats.description: List-style cuts with bold text overlays per item

formats.name: Storytime
formats.description: Sustained talking head with B-roll cutaways

formats.name: Trend jack
formats.description: Sync to viral audio for first 1.5s, payoff with cultural twist

formats.name: Hook in 1.5s
formats.description: Text overlay hook + 3-4 rapid cuts proving the claim

formats.name: Before vs After
formats.description: Split screen or sequential cuts, payoff at 5s

formats.name: Trying viral X
formats.description: Multi-attempt journey, narration over each try
